zh.title: Solana/美元技术分析：震荡偏强上行延续
zh.content:
当前SOL/USD整体维持震荡偏强结构，价格运行于短期均线之上，市场情绪偏多但节奏较为克制。近期走势以高位整理为主，上行趋势仍在延续但未出现加速放量突破。

从技术指标看，价格稳站SMA20上方（74.59），确认中期多头结构。MACD为正值0.54，显示动能仍偏多，但缺乏RSI数据，短线超买状态需谨慎评估，趋势健康但不强势。

阻力方面，短期关键压力位在77.19前高，突破后有望上看78.5区域。支撑方面，首先关注75.56日内低点，其次为74.6附近20日均线支撑，整体支撑结构较为稳固。

操作建议以回踩低吸为主，75.5上方可分批布局多单，止损参考74.5下方；若放量突破77.2并站稳，可顺势追多，但需严格控制仓位并防范冲高回落风险。

en.title: Solana vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Solana against the US dollar is showing a mild bullish structure, with price holding above the 20-day simple moving average at 74.59. The latest price near 76.63 reflects steady recovery after recent consolidation. Price action remains contained within a narrow 24-hour range between 75.56 and 77.19, suggesting equilibrium between buyers and sellers. Overall trend leans slightly upward with improving short-term momentum but no strong breakout yet.

MACD reading at 0.54035374 indicates positive momentum and supports the bullish bias in the short term. Signal line data is not available, which limits confirmation of trend strength. RSI is also unavailable, but price behavior suggests neutral to mildly bullish conditions. Momentum remains constructive as long as price holds above the SMA baseline, though lack of oscillator confirmation calls for cautious positioning near-term volatility expected.

Key support is seen at 75.56, with stronger structural support near the 20-day SMA around 74.59. A breakdown below this zone could expose 73.00 as next downside target. On the upside, immediate resistance sits at 77.19, followed by 78.50 and psychological 80 level. Market structure suggests compression ahead of potential breakout or rejection move. Volume expansion will be required to confirm directional breakout beyond this range.

Trading strategy favors range-bound approaches while price remains between support and resistance. Buying dips near 75.50 to 74.60 zone may offer favorable risk-reward, with stop-loss placed below 74.00. Profit-taking can be considered near 77.20 and higher resistance levels. Alternatively, a breakout above 77.20 could signal continuation toward 78.50–80 range, warranting momentum entries with trailing stops. Risk management remains essential given compressed volatility conditions.
